Tests for compositor functionality and build script for testing the compositor service.


## Files
- **[test_compositor.c](test_compositor.c.md)**: Tests for compositor functionality in the Pebble firmware, including animation and modal transitions.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing the compositor service in the pebble-firmware project.
